title: QuantumFlow — High-Frequency Crypto Arbitrage Protocol
description: An ultra-low latency decentralized arbitrage protocol executing cross-DEX trading across Solana, Arbitrum, and Ethereum with sub-10ms execution.
caseStudy:
## Project Overview

QuantumFlow is a high-frequency decentralized arbitrage engine designed for high-stakes institutional liquidators. The system monitors liquidity pools across Solana, Arbitrum, and Ethereum, identifying price discrepancies in real-time.

## Technical Architecture

- **Orderbook Engine** — Custom Rust core utilizing Solana Jito-Solana MEV bundles for zero-rejection tx execution.
- **Market Ingestion** — gRPC streaming node connecting directly to validators with sub-5ms packet processing.
- **Smart Contract Layer** — Anchor framework contracts on Solana and Solidity ERC-4626 vaults on EVM chains.

## Key Performance Results

- **$120M+** monthly volume processed
- **sub-8ms** average execution latency
- **99.99%** bundle inclusion rate
- **Zero** capital loss over 8 months of continuous production operations
